rules.chapter: Lagna Sun Moon Mars Mercury Jupiter Venus Saturn Rahu Ketu
rules.translation: The fifth lord (Venus) is with Jupiter, the third and the twelfth lord in the second house.
Venus as the lord of her tenth house ‘gave her the kingdom and as the fifth lord gave her, four children.
The lord of the lagna, Jupiter, aspects the Moon in the Dhanu and it is the combination of the lagna and the fifth lord.
between the lagna lord, Mars and the fifth lord, the Sun.
Then the fifth lord, the Sun combines with Venus in the lagna.
Here the fifth Lord, Jupiter and the ninth lord, Mars combine in the sixth house, an artha trikona.
The second and the fifth lord, the Sun and Mars in the fourth house with the eleventh lord, Venus is still better.
Mars the lagna lord combines with the fifth lord Jupiter anc forms a Rajayoga.
The dasha of the fifth lord is the time for such promised
4. kt being the dasha of his fifth lord his children are also prospering.
The exchange between the fifth lord, Venus and the eighth lord, Saturn in his horoscope made his experiences with his children very painful.
He will propitiate deities consistent with the indications of the fifth lord.
the 5th lord in Navamsa, quite the opposite results will happen.
When the lord of the 2nd is in the 5th with the 5th lord, children will prosper and the native gets their help and financial assistance.
If the 5th lord is in the 8th or vice versa, both these lords will produce financial losses during their Dasas and Bhuktis.

There are the secondary considerations, viz., the occupants of the fifth house, the associates joining the fifth lord and the karaka and the Yogakaraka, i.e , the planets causing the various yogas bearing on the fifth house.
If the 5th lord is favourably disposed, the person will be blessed with a beautiful wife and well-behaving children.
Lord of the Lagna in the fifth and the fifth lord strong, or exchange of houses between first and fifth lords, favours birth of children.
An obedient child is born if the 5th lord aspects or occupies the ascendant and lord of Lagna is similarly disposed towards the 5th.
A disobedient child is born if the 5th lord is afflicted and unaspected by Lagnadhipati but seen by Mars or Rahu.
We have to consider whether the native is likely to enjoy the Dasa of the 5th lord during his lifetime.

If there is no chance of the Dasa of the 5th lord being enjoyed, then we have to find out the planets which will influence the 5th house by way of occupation and aspect and whether the native will enjoy the Dasa of such planets.
The 5th lord in his own house or otherwise strong: there will be birth of sons and favour from superiors.
Misunderstandings with the sons will be the result if the 5th lord in Lagna has an adverse Navamsa position.

If the 5th lord has the above situation, but in the Navamsa is in the 6th, 8th or 12th from the place occupied by the 6th lord, there will be destruction of prosperity and he will be the victim of his ruler's wrath.
When the 5th lord is in the seventh in association with the seventh lord, the native will be benefited by his son's trip to and residence in foreign countries.
The 5th lord afflicted, misfortunes befall children.
When the 5th lord is in the 8th with the 8th lord, there will be death of children or abortions to wife, misunderstandings with kith and kin, displeasure of superiors and rulers and loss in business.

When the 5th lord is in the ninth in association with the 9th lord and the lord of Lagna weak and joining the ninth, the person will have happiness from father during his boyhood or during the Dasa of the 5th lord.
When the 5th lord is very strong, there will be unexpected dawn of prosperity and fortune.
This will be the case only if the 5th lord is Mars or the 5th house happens to be a sign of Mars.
If the 5th lord is the Sun or Leo happens to be the 9th house, the person will become an author of religious books.

There will be acquisition of wealth through a new administrative job, one's own occupation, and through female sources if the 5th lord is the Moon, Jupiter and Venus respectively or the 9th happens to be a sign ruled by one of the above three planets.

When the 5th lord is in the tenth in conjunction with the 10th lord or is in Lagna with the lord of Lagna, or in Navamsa Lagna, or the 5th and 10th lords are in Lagna, during the sub-period of the 10th lord, in the major period of the 5th lord, or in the sub-periods of Lagnadhipati, in the major period of the 5th lord, the person will acquire a kingdom or become head of a State, or a Minister, consistent with the strength of the lords concerned.
When the 5th lord is strongly disposed, as indicated above, but the Lagna lord is weak, Raja Yoga, during the Dasa of the 5th lord, will be enjoyed by the son.
When the 5th lord is in the 11th with the 11th lord, there will be acquisition of riches and gains from business.
If in addition to the above disposition of the 5th lord, the 2nd lord is in deep exaltation in Rasi or in Navamsa, immense wealth and fortune will flow in.
When the 5th lord is in the 11th with the 11th lord, there will be gain through his sons or Government sources or elder brother, or one will acquire a new job.
As the Dasa of the 5th lord, when in the 11th with the 11th lord, is a Yoga Dasa, it is capable of conferring highly beneficial results.
When the 5th lord occupies the 6th, 8th or 12th from the Lagnadhipati, in the Navamsa, contrary results should be expected..
When strongly disposed, the 5th lord, in the above combination, is also capable of conferring during his Dasa mantrasiddhi.
When the 5th lord is in the 2nd with the 2nd lord, there will be domestic happiness and the person will develop power of eloquence.
When the 5th lord is in the 3rd in association with the 3rd lord, b irth of children must be predicted in the sub- period of the 3rd lord within the major period of the 5th lord.

In this way, the results likely to happen during the Dasa of the 5th lord should be anticipated skilfully, taking into consideration the blends of strength and weakness the planet concerned is subject to.
From Chandra Lagna again the 5th is aspected by Mars while the 5th lord is blemished in exactly the same way as the 5th house from Lagna.
From Chandra Lagna, the 5th house and the 5th lord are subject to a number of afflictions.
The Fifth House—In Chart No- 93 Aries, the fifth house, is aspected by Mars the 5th lord.
The Fifth Lord.—Mars the 5th lord is considerably afflicted by his association with Rahu and 8th lord Moon.
The Fifth Lord.—The 5th lord Moon is equally afflicted by his conjunction with Mars, in the 8th.
Conclusion.—As both the 5th lord and the 5th house are considerably afflicted, the native has had no issues.
Mark also the affliction of the 5th lord from Chandra Lagna and of the 5th house from Navamsa Lagna.
Conclusion.—The 5th house and the 5th lord are rendered neutral by the almost equal distribution of benefic
The Fifth Lord.—The 5th lord Saturn is no doubt in a benefic sign, aspecting the 5th house.
The disposition of 5th house and the 5th lord indicates the birth of children.
In the Navamsa the 5th lord is Mars and he is with Ketu in Sagittarius.
The 5th is aspected by Saturn the 5th lord.
But as the 5th house is afflicted and the 5th lord almost weak, their survival is not shown.
The Fifth Lord—The fifth lord Mercury is afflicted by his association with malefics Sun and Rahu.
Usually the number of children to be born is guessed by the number of Navamsas gained by the 5th house or 5th lord.
If the 5th lord is aspected by Jupiter or Venus, the number is doubled.
The 5th lord Venus is with the Sun and Mercury, while Jupiter Putrakaraka, having caused Gajakesari, is aspected by Mars.
The 5th lord Venus has gained by 5

From Chandra Lagna, the 5th house is well fortified by the presence of Mercury, the 5th lord.
The 5th lord Sun has gained 5 Navamsas.
Actually so far 13 children have been born out of which, due to affliction of the 5th lord and Putrakaraka by Mars and Saturn respectively, the native has lost 3 issues.
The 5th lord is, of course, Mars.
Mars, the 5th lord, has gained 5 Navamsas.

In the Fifth House : -If the lord of the 8th is in the 5th with the 5th lord, the children of the native may get into trouble.
Considered from the Moon : The 8th house is Sagittarius occupied by 2nd and 5th lord Mercury, 4th lord Sun and Rahu and aspected by 7th lord Mars.
He is aspected by the 4th and 5th lord Saturn and adversely by 7th lord Mars.
The Lagna is occupied by 5th lord Moon and Lagna lord aspects both Lagna and the Moon in exaltation.
Considered from the Moon : The 8th house is Sagittarius occupied by 2nd and 5th lord Mercury, 4th lord maiefic Sun and Rahu and aspected by 7th and 12th lord malefic Mars.
When the 5th lord is a benefic and the Sun is also beneficially disposed, the native will give happiness to the father.
If the 5th lord or the Sun is afflicted by Saturn, Rahu or Mandi, the native will be a source of misery to the father.
If the lord of the 9th house joins the 5th lord in the 5th house, the native experiences great clarity of thought and consequent tranquility.
The crux of the horoscope revolves round Sagittarius which is not only the Lagna but also the pivot of a powerful Rajayoga involving 5th lord Mars, Lagna lord Jupiter, 10th lord Mercury and Saturn.

Lagna lord Venus aspecting the Lagna, Yogakaraka Saturn Vargottama in the 5th, the Sasi- Mangala Yoga in the 10th house, the Sankha Yoga caused by 5th lord Mercury, and 6th lord Venus in a kendra and the combination of the Sun and Mercury (kendra and kona lords) in a powerful kendra have resulted in an excellent Raja Yoga for fame, money and success.
Aquarius is a philosophical sign which trait is brought out by its occupation of the 5th lord.
The 5th lord in the 10th gives intuitive and psychic abilities while Jupiter's presence in the 2nd house is important for giving correct predictions.
The 10th house is also aspected by Jupiter, the 5th lord and Dhanakaraka, who associates very closely with the 2nd lord Sun.
149, in addition, has 5th lord Venus in a kendra with neechabhanga.

Mercury as Lagna lord in Lagna is very good while his combination with the 5th lord Venus and 3rd lord the Sun has given the native a rich, deep and beautiful voice charged with fervour (Moon's aspect) making her a singer of great popularity and charm.
Saturn as the 5th lord conjoining with 10th lord Mercury constitutes a Rajayoga.
Saturn the 4th and 5th lord in the 10th with the 9th lord causes a powerful Rajayoga.
From Lagna, the 5th lord Venus, the 11th lord Mars and yogakaraka Saturn in association from a formidable combination for an autocratic birth and background.

He is aspected by 5th lord Saturn.

Jupiter, the ruler of the major and the sub-periods, is the 2nd and 5th lord associating with the 9th lord the Moon and aspecting the 2nd house.
If the lord of the 12th occupies the 5th along with the 5th lord, the native gets progeny in the former's periods.
If Jupiter or the 5th lord afflicts the 12th lord in the 11th house, the native's wealth may be dissipated by a bad son.
When the lord of the seventh house tenants Pushya, it may indicate a nurturing spouse; the fifth lord there may indicate nurturing children, and so on.

In spite of Lagnadhipathi being fortified as above, if he occupies 6th, 8th or 12th in the Navamsa from the sign held by the 2nd lord, there will be a lessening of the above effects.

The exaltation of the 2nd lord of his disposition in Lagna, the 4th, 5th, 7th, 9th or 10th, will fortify him to the extent of making him a yogakaraka.
The native will be enabled to earn considerable fortune through business or other occupations consistent with the nature of the 2nd lord and 2nd house.

An affliction to the 2nd lord may also express itself in the shape of the subject not getting nutritious and delicious food, or his family and children suffering from constant diseases, or want of cordial relations between the native and his life-partner.
When the 2nd lord in the 5th is well fortified there will be unexpected acquisition of wealth through lotteries, crosswords, or the favour of rulers.

Amassing of wealth by black-marketing, deceit, dissimulation and by creating misunderstandings and troubles between friends and relatives and through questionable and suspicious dealings can be anticipated if the second lord joins the 6th and is well fortified.
When the second lord who joins the 7th with the 7th lord is strong there will be influx of wealth through foreign sources.
When the Rasi, Navamsa or the constellation held by the 2nd lord happens to be a feminine one, then he will benefit by contact with women.
When the 2nd lord is strong, there will be influx as well as loss of wealth.
There will also be benefits through different sources according to the nature of the sign and nakshatra held by the 2nd lord.
If the second lord is afflicted, he will lose money on this account.
If the 2nd lord is with good planets in a kendra or if the 2nd house has all the good association and aspects he will be on good terms with relatives.
The eye suffers if the second lord is with Venus or the subject becomes night-blind if the Sun and the Moon are in the second.

If the second lord is in the first—One earns money by his own exertions and generally by manual labour.
When the 2nd lord is in the 6th, 8th or 12th in Navamsa, there will be fame but no wealth.

There will be prosperity and improvement in financial matters if the 2nd lord joins the 3rd lord in the 3rd house.
There will be acquisition of lands, cars, houses and financial advantages through literary and intellectual activities if the 2nd lord is in the 4th with the 4th lord.
None of the above benefits will accrue if the 2nd lord is in an unfavourable Navamsa disposition from the 4th lord.
Venus as 2nd lord, joined by Rahu, or Mars as 2nd lord, joined by Saturn, indicate during their Dasa or Bhukti, that the wife (or husband) will go astray.
If 2nd lord is strong, he will acquire wealth as a physician.

When the 2nd lord is in the 6th, 8th or 12th from the 10th lord in the Navamsa, contrary results will happen.
No losses should be predicted when the 2nd lord is unfavourably disposed from the 12th lord in the Navamsa.
When the 2nd lord is in Lagna with the lord of Lagna, the native will beget children during the Dasa of the 2nd lord.
In the matter of predicting Dasa results, one should carefully consider the position of the 2nd lord and the planet in question, not only in Rasi but in the Navamsa also.

rules.translation: The tenth lord (Venus) is with Jupiter in the second house.
Rahu and Ketu and the Sun (the tenth lord of the birth horoscope) are vargottama, as they have not changed their positions.
Mars (the tenth lord) with Venus the ninth lord in the seventh house

When the 10th lord is afflicted, he will become immoral and commit sins and his brothers take to questionable means of earning money.
If the 10th lord joins, there will be reverses in profession.

If the lord of the 9th house is in the 10th house with the 10th lord beneficially disposed, the native becomes renowned for his learning.
He is aspected by 5th and 10th lord Mars.
Jupiter, if combined with or aspected by the 10th lord, leads one to acts of piety.
If 10th lord is in the 6th, 8th or 12th from Navamsa Lagna or in an unfriendly constellation in the 3rd house, the native's rise in life is slow and beset with obstacles.
The same result obtains if the 10th lord conjoins the 8th lord in the 4th house in a malefic shashtyamsa.
He may become the head of an orphanage or remand home if the 10th lord occupies the 6th, 8th or 12th Navamsa.
If Saturn aspects the 10th lord, he may have to work all his life in a low-paying jbb with not much prospects.
If benefics aspect the 10th lord, he holds a post of authority and will be held in high esteem for his character.
If Rahu or afflicted malefics are with the 10th lord, he may suffer disgrace in his career.
In the Seventh House: The 10th lord placed in the 7th house gives a mature wife who will assist the native in his work.
If Jupiter influences the 10th lord by aspect or association in the 8th house, he will become a mystic or spiritual teacher.
In the Ninth House: The 10th lord in the 9th house makes the native a spiritual stalwart.
He will be a beacon light to spiritual seekers if Jupiter aspects the 10th lord.
In the Tenth House: If the 10th lord is strongly disposed in the 10th, the native can be highly successful in his profession and command respect and honour.
If the 10th lord occupies the 6th, 8th or 12th houses from Navamsa, the native's career will be routine and ordinary.
If three other planets conjoin the 10th lord in the 10th house, the native becomes an ascetic.
He will be separated from his family and wander about without success if malefics afflict the 10th lord.
He will indulge in smuggling and other nefarious activities, Rahu afflicting the 10th lord makes the native a cheat and a criminal.
A statistical study of over 50 charts has revealed that it is only in 15 charts that the 10th lord and the 10th Bhava were definite factors in determining the native's profession.
Taking the first : When there is no planet in the 10th house, take the 10th lord as primary determinant and the lord of the Navamsa occupied by the 10th house as the secondary determinant.

When the 10th house is occupied by a planet, then of the lord of the 10th house, its occupant and the lord of the Navamsa occupied by the 10th lord, the strongest planet becomes the primary determinant.
Mars as lord of the sign occupied by the 10th lord Mercury has given a militant profession.
The Lagna would emerge the strongest of the three and the 10th lord from here indicates a military profession.
In deciding the vocational determinant, another important factor is also to be considered, viz., the planet whose shad- vargas predominate in regard to the 10th lord and the 10th house.
If the 10th lord joins Saturn together with the lord of the Navamsa occupied by the 10th lord and is influenced by aspect or conjunction with the 6th lord, the native will have more than one wife.

The following results can be generally expected to take place during the Dasa of the lord of the 10th house :— Benefics with the 10th lord in the Ascendant with the Ascendant lord make the native renowned.
If the 10th lord is placed in the 6th, 8th or 12th in the Navamsa, the native will be a just and peace-loving man.
If the 10th lord combines with malefics in the Ascendant, his Dasa brings in disgrace and humiliation.
If the 10th lord in the 3rd is in the 6th, 8th or 12th Navamsa, the native has a mediocre period.
He will wander aimlessly during the 10th lord's Dasa.
If Mercury or Jupiter is with the 10th lord, the native heads an educational or research organisation.
If the 10th lord joins the 5th lord in the 5th house and benefics also aspect the combination, the native rises to the rank of a minister during this period.
If the 10th lord is in inimical signs or in the 6th, 8th or 12th from the Navamsa Lagna, the results will be greatly reduced and the native may be a mere member of the Assembly.
If malefics afflict the 10th lord, the Dasa makes the native work for others at death and similar inauspicious ceremonies.
If malefics afflict the 10th lord, he will follow a profession that may not fetch much money and as a consequence suffer penury.
If Mars afflicts the 7th house, she will leave him in the Dasa of the 10th lord.
The native will hold low jobs or take to a career of crime if Rahu afflicts the Moon and the 10th lord.
If Ketu joins the 10th lord, the person embarks on a life of spiritual sadhana.

If Mars aspects the 10th lord or associates with him, he will acquire immovable property from his father.
If Mercury is powerfully disposed, he goes abroad for education and research in the Dasa of the 10th lord.
The native will prosper along with his father if Jupiter associates with the 10th lord.
Venus in the same position will confer on the native gold, precious stones, conveyances and all kinds of comforts in the 10th lord's Dasa.
If Rajayogas are present, the native acquires power, status and eminence in the Dasa of the 10th lord.
He will have a step-mother who will ill-treat him and cause him hardships during the 10th lord's Dasa.
If the Moon is with the 10th lord, he earns through vehicles, trade in sea-products, milk, restaurants.
If the Sun is with the 10th lord, his income comes from woollen-factories, match-industries, gold market and chemicals.
If the 10th lord is in a malefic Navamsa and the 11th house is also affiicteo, mese same sources will give the native losses.
Or if the 10th lord is feeble in strength but not afflicted, his Dasa fetches the native moderate success and wealth.
If the 10th lord is fortified, the native pursues his spiritual inclinations with zeal.
If the 10th house is vacant, then the lord of the Navamsa occupied by the 10th lord gives a clue to the nature of the profession the native may follow.
If the lord of the Navamsa occupied by the 10th lord is the Sun, the native earns through work connected with medi cine, wool, grass, grain, gold, diplomacy and mediation and arbitration.

If Mars be the ruler of the Navamsa occupied by the 10th lord, the native makes his living through metals, minerals, buildings, occupations involving fire, thieving, feats of valour, military occupations, butchering, driving, chemist-shops and doctoring.

Besides the 10th lord and house, the sign occupied by the 10th lord, other planets and sign or signs predominant in the chart as well as a fortified Lagna are some more factors that go to colour the occupation or vocation of the native.

It is occupied by Vargottama Jupiter and aspected by the 10th lord Mars.

But if the 10th lord be weak and in the 7th house, the native will be of evil conduct.
Five planets including the 10th lord in a quadrant or trine give birth to a saint of great spirituality who will be a jeevanmukta.
Pisces, the sign of intuition, is powerfully placed and houses the 10th lord and Ascendant signifying the astrological potential of the native.

For a Sagittarius ascendant, the tenth house is Virgo and the tenth lord is therefore Mercury.
The friendship of the Moon with the dynamic tenth lord Mars does, however, create a dynamic interest in career.
This principle may also be applied to the lord of a house; a tenth lord which occupies Magha may bestow abundant career opportunities. .
For example, a man whose tenth lord occupies Ardra, which is ruled by Rudra, may shed tears over his profession.

rules.chapter: T H E D H A R M A K A R M A A D H I P A T I YOGAS
rules.translation: Although a Dharma Karma Adhipati Yoga is defined as a combination by association or mutual aspect between a kona lord and a kendra lord, it is also said to be formed when: (a) the lord of the ninth house occupies the ninth house and the tenth lord occupies the tenth house, or when the fourth lord occupies the fourth and the fifth lord tenants the fifth. (In these cases, two Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas are often formed.) (b) the lord of the ninth occupies the tenth and the tenth lord dwells in the ninth, or the fourth lord appears in the fifth and the fifth lord resides in the fourth. (This is a type of Parzuartana Y o g a see below.) In certain lagnas a single graha owns both a kendra and a kona.
Jupiter as tenth lord is again only neutrally placed for the tenth house of career.
Mars,a male planet, in own sign if in Aries is better than Mars in Scorpio, a female sign.
Because the Moon is waxing and Mars occupies his own sign, this yoga has received some vitality.
Mars occupies his own sign in Rasi and Navamsa and Jupiter occupies his own sign in Navamsa.
In Navamsa, he occupies his own sign with Mars.
Mercury is in exact degree combination with yogakaraka Mars and in his own sign Navamsa.
Karaka: Mars occupies a quadrant from Lagna, his own sign and is not aspected by any planet.
either Mars, who is in its own sign but in a very weak Avastha - dead (Mrita), in fact - or the exalted Jupiter, who is combust and in Bala Avastha.
Mars placed in the ascendant or in the 8th and be conjunct Saturn or Sun or be in aspect to a malefic, being bereft of benefic aspect will prove a source of (immediate) death.

These factors may influence the 11th house either as the lords of the main periods or as the lords of sub-periods. (1) The sub periods of planets capable of influencing the 11 th house in the major periods of those who are also capable of influencing the 11th house produce rasults pertaining to the 11th house par excellence. (2) The sub-periods of planets associated with the 11th house in the major periods of planets, who are not associated with the 11th house, will produce results pertaining to the 11th house only to a limited extent. (3) Similarly the sub- periods of planets who are not associated with the 11th house in the major periods of planets who are associated with the 11th lord will produce results pertaining to the 11th house only to a feeble degree.

The following may also become Marakas or death-inflicting planets :— (i) Benefic planets in association with lords of 2nd and 7th, (ii) lordsof 3rd and 8th and (iii) lord of 3rd or 8th associated with 2nd or 7th lord. (c) Tertiary Determinants of Death.—(i) Saturn in conjunction, association or aspect with the Marakas (determinants of death) mentioned above, (ii) lord of the 6th or 8th whether or not he is associated with a Maraka planet, and (iii) the least powerful planet in the horoscope.
When the lord of Lagna is in the 6th, 8th or 12th from the 7th lord in the Navamsa, the person will be deprived of means of livelihood, defamed and will have misunderstandings with his wife.
When the lord of the 2nd is in the 7th in conjunction with the 7th lord, he will get good dowry or property from father-in-law.
When the 7th lord has maraka power, then death of the native or his wife may happen in this Dasa.
When the 7th lord is in Lagna, one of the brothers will settle in a foreign country and he will help the native.
When the 7th lord is weak, the brother will roam about in distant lands and lead a sinful life.
When the 7th lord also joins the above combination, father will not die but he will become inimi-cally disposed towards his son.
There are the secondary considerations also, viz , the occupants of the 7th house and the planets associating with the 7th lord.
If the 7th lord and Venus are afflicted, the native may be sensual and seek clandestine relationship with the opposite sex.
If a maraka Dasa is on, the native may die during the period of the seventh lord.
If the 7th lord is weak, there may be no children.
If there are both afflictions and benefic influences on the 7th lord, the native may get only female progeny.
If Venus is well placed but the 7th lord is afflicted, the native may suffer from piles.
If benefics are placed in the 2nd, the 7th and the 11th houses from the 7th lord, the wife or husband will be able to derive all happiness with healthy and lucky children.
If the 7th lord and Venus are in even signs, if the 7th house is also an even sign and the 5th and 7th lords are not combust or otherwise weak, the person will have a gooi wife and children.
If the 7th house be a benefic sign or if Venus as 7th lord be aspected by a benefic planet, the wife or husband will be devoted and charming.
If the 7th lord and Venus are in the 6th house.
If the 7th lord or Venus be conjoined with Rahu or Ketu and be aspected by a malefic, the native or his wife will be adulterous.
If the 7th lord and Venus be each in a common sign or Navamsa, the person will marry at least twice.
If the 7th lord be Saturn and conjoined with a malefic, the person will have many wives.

If the 2nd, 1st and 6th lords be conjoined with malefics, in the 7th house, or if the strong 7th lord occupy a kendra or kona aspected by the 10th lord, or if the strong 7th and 11th lords conjoin or mutually aspect or occupy trines, the native will have many wives.
If the 1st or 7th lord be in depression or occupy an inimical sign or be eclipsed in Navamsa, the native will have another wife while the first is still living.
The strength and associations of the karaka and of the 7th house and 7th lord from the Moon must also be duly weighed before making an assessment of the quality of marriage.
Where the 7th lord is involved in a powerful yoga, he is capable of producing in his Dasa or Bhukti, the results of the yoga relating to the 7th house.
If the 7th house is severely afflicted, the 7th lord may, in his Dasa or Bhukti, cause destruction of the marriage or make it extremely miserable.
During the Dasa of the 7th lord who is well placed, the native will enjoy the company of his wife and many pleasures with her.
If the 7th lord is ill-placed and afflicted, the native may suffei separation from his wife.
If the 7th lord is well-placed with the Ascendant lord in the 7th, travel abroad will be lucky.
If the 7th lord is weak, one may be forced to beg in his Dasa.
When the 7th lord joins the 2nd lord in the 2nd house, his period may fetch much money and wealth through marriage.
If the 7th lord is in the 8th from Navamsa Lagna, the native's wife may not die but he may instead marry a second wife in some distant place.
Much travelling is indicated in the period of the 7th lord if he combines with the 4th lord in the 4th house.
This is specially so if the 7th lord is in the 6th, 8th or 12th from Navamsa Lagna.
Since the 7th lord is a maraka, it forebodes death or dangers to one's maternal uncle.
The 7th lord in the 7th house with benefics is generally very favourable in his period.
Fortune comes through marriage in the period of the 7th lord if he is placed in the 9th with the 9th lord.
If the 7th lord in the 9th is afflicted, the wife will lead him astray and away from his duties.
He will harbour ill-will and hatred for others and indulge in wicked deeds, if the 7th lord is placed in the 6th, 8th or 12th Navamsa, the evil results are greatly intensified.
If the fortified 7th lord is in the 10th with the 10th lord, the native will gain much fame and reputation abroad.
His profession in the period of the 7th lord will flourish well and he will obtain renown and distinction in his field of activity.
If afflicted, elder brother may suffer losses, if the 7th lord has both benefic and malefic influences, gains from business will be moderate.
If the 7th lord is in the 12th house and the karaka is also very weak, marital happiness will be lacking and one may lose one's wife through death or separation.
If the 7th lord and Venus be both strong, wife may predecease husband only late in life.
If the Lagna lord combines with the 7th lord in the 12th house with 12th lord both native and wife may reside abroad in the Dasa of any one of these planets, particularly of the 7th lord.
If the combination has benefic influences, the native may take to a life of spiritual discipline in the period of the 7th lord.
The lord of the sign occupied by the 7th lord or that of the sign occupied by the 7th lord in Navamsa are capable of giving marriage in their Dasas.

The lords of the 9th and 10th houses are empowered to give marriage in their Dasas if the earlier Dasas are fruitless- Marriage is also possible in the period of the planet with the 7th lord or the planet occupying the 7th house.
The resultant obtained by adding the Moon's longitude to that of the 7th lord or its trines when transited by Jupiter can also give marriage.
Saturn's aspect on the 7th house and 7th lord both from Lagna and the Moon and on Venus delays marriage if the Dasa lord is not very strong.
The association or aspect of the lord of the 6th, 8th or 12th on the 7th house, 7th lord and karaka also rules out early marriage.

If the 7th house from Lagna in the case of men be a sign ruled by Mars or in an Amsa of Mars and if the 7th lord from the Navamsa Lagna be weak or with Rahu or Ketu, the wife will be rejected by the native, and she may become unchaste even when young.

In the case of women if the Lagna be owned by Mars or in a Navamsa of Mars and if the 7th lord in Navamsa be afflicted as stated above, the native will be a servant-maid or go astray even as a girl and be rejected by her husband.
If the 7th house and the 7th lord be subject to papakartari yoga, that is, being hemmed inbetween malefic planets, with out any benefic influence, the result is loss of husband.
He is aspected by a benefic as well as 7th lord Jupiter and by Mars, a malefic being the 3rd and 8th lord.
The 7th lord Venus is quite favourably disposed as analysed above.
The strength of the 7th lord Jupiter gives a strong-willed husband while the

Recollecting the periods propitious for marriage, (1) the lords of the Rasi and Navamsa occupied by the 7th lord, (2) Venus, (3) the Moon, (4) the lord of sign occupied by the 2nd lord, (5) the 10th and (6) 9th lords and finally, (7) the 7th lord or occupant of the 7th house can give marriage in respective order in their periods.
The lords of the Rasi and Navamsa occupied by the 7th lord—Jupiter, Jupiter 2.

delays marriage but the strength of karaka Venus and 7th lord Jupiter cannot push it off too far.

The Seventh Lord': Mercury, the 7th lord, is with Mars in the 12th house aspected by Lagna lord Jupiter and 10th and 11th lord Saturn.
Conclusion: The presence of karaka Venus in the 11th house, a common sign as the 7th house both from Lagna and the Moon, and the 7th lord Jupiter in another dual sign resulted in two marriages.
1 where the 7th lord Jupiter and Venus are in dual signs but where the native had only one marriage.
Jupiter is the 7th lord and Venus is the karaka.
Conclusion : Due to the occupation of Venus as 7th lord and as Kalatrakaraka of common sign, the native married a second time after the death of the first.
The 7th lord Mars' association with Ketu gives tiffs between partners and a touchy wife.
Jupiter's aspect on the 7th lord Mars was also responsible for a fair degree for happiness in married life.
Considered from the Moon : The 7th house Scorpio is occupied by Vargottama Jupiter and aspected by 7th lord Chart No.

Mars as 7th lord aspecting the 7th house protects it.

Venus and Mars, as Lagna and 7th lord, are together but with Rahu.
There are no benefic influences on the 7th lord or 7th house.
The association of 7th lord Mars with Yogakaraka Saturn gave a well-to-do and socially well-placed partner but the debility of Mars made him debased.
Conclusion : The strength of the 7th lord and Kalatra-karaka, Jupiter and Venus respectively, and the blemish-free 7th lords and 7th houses both from Lagna and the Moon have given a happy marriage.
The 7th lord Jupiter aspects it from the 11th house while the 6th and 11th lord Mars, and 5th and 12th lord Venus aspect it from the Lagna.
The 7th lord Venus in the 8th is with Moon-sign lord Mars.
aspect of 7th lord Jupiter on the 7th and of Karaka Venus also on it have given the native a devoted wife.

The extremely powerful situation of the 7th lord, particularly from the Moon, has given the native a partner who is not only materially well placed but also held in great reverence for his character, integrity and learning.
The Budha-Aditya Yoga relating to the 7th lord has given an intellectual husband while making the native also highly intelligent and learned in her own sphere of activity.
16 is aspected by 7th lord the Sun and 2nd and 11th lord Jupiter.
The 7th lord Saturn is aspected also by 6th and 9th lord Jupiter.
Conclusion: The 7th lord Mars and Venus both as karaka and 7th lord from the Moon in dual signs gave the native two wives.
The papakartari yoga of the 7th lord Mars resulted in disharmony in married life
Conclusion : The 7th house is afflicted because although the 7th lord aspects it, the aspect is of a planet rendered malefic by debility and association with a node.
The debilitation and eclipse of the 7th lord Saturn and Mars in the 8th house resulted in the death of wife.
Moreover, the 8th and 10th lords have exchanged signs so that Saturn who is the 7th lord also is afflicted by this parivartana.
Rahu afflicts the 7th lord by his complement Ketu.
Conclusion: Although the 7th lord Jupiter is strongly placed, his exchange of signs with 5th lord Saturn is not desir able as it can deny marriage or progeny.
The strength of the 7th lord gave a good husband and did not deny marriage.

But the several afflictions to the 7th house and 7th lord, to Venus and particularly to the 8th lord from both Lagna and Chandra Lagna and the running Dasa being that of the afflicting planet Rahu resulted in death of

Conclusion : The 7th lord afflicted by Rahu and Mars gave a disgusting husband who was at once stupid and stubborn.
From the Lagna itself both karaka and 7th lord are in the 6th house which is the 12th house from the 7th house.
Considered from the Moon : The 7th house is aspected by 7th lord Saturn and Yogakaraka Mars.
The Seventh Lord: The Moon as the 7th lord is not afflicted by aspect or association.
Conclusion : The 7th lord from the Moon is afflicted by the malefic aspects of Mars and Saturn.
In Navamsa, the 7th lord Jupiter is with Mars and the 8th lord Saturn is combust.
In the Seventh House : The lord of the 8th house placed in the 7th house with the 7th lord curtails longevity.
When the Lagna lord or the 7th lord conjoins the 2nd and 4th lords, death results through indigestion.

Secondary Determinants of Death : (a) Benefic planets in association with the 2nd and 7th lords are less powerful in causing death than malsfic planets. (b) Lords of the 3rd and the 8th. (c) The lord of the 3rd or 8th house associating with the 2nd or the 7th lord.
The 3rd house is occupied by 7th lord Mercury and afflicted by Rahu.
Rahu is a malefic associated with 7th lord from Lagna.
As Rahu happens to be a malefic associate of the 7th lord he has every qualification to inflict death in his Dasa.
Mars is the 7th lord from the Moon Chart No.
He is as- pected by 7th lord Saturn.
The Eighth House: The 8th house is Sagittarius aspected by 7th lord eclipsed Mars.
Jupiter as 7th lord from Lagna becomes a powerful maraka, more so being aspected by 2nd occupant Saturn.
Venus is with Mercury who is the 7th lord from the Moon.
Mars, the Dasa lord, is the 2nd and 7th lord from Lagna and from the Moon in Navamsa.
Jupiter is the 7th lord from Lagna and hence a killer.
occupant from the Moon and 7th lord from both Lagna and Moon in Navamsa.

The Eighth House : Taurus is aspected by yogakaraka Saturn and occupied by 2nd and 7th lord Mars.

Ayushkaraka : Saturn is also the karaka and is aspected by 7th lord, afflicted Jupiter, and 6th and 11th lord Mars.
Jupiter is the 7th lord while Saturn is the 7th lord both from Moon and Navamsa Lagna.
In Navamsa, he is the 7th lord from Navamsa Lagna and joins the 2nd lord Moon.
In Navamsa, he is with a maraka Saturn and is the 7th lord from the Moon.
Jupiter is the 7th lord from Lagna and the 8th lord from the Moon.
If the lord of the ninth house occupy the 7th house with the 7th lord, the native will earn wealth in foreign lands.
Mars in the 2nd from the 9th house with the 2nd and 7th lord therefrom, namely, Venus and therefore, becomes a powerful maraka.
The Dasa lord Venus is the 2nd and 7th lord from the Pitrukaraka.
90 Virgo is occupied by the 7th lord Moon and Lagna lord Saturn.
92 the 9th house is aspected by own lord Mercury, and 2nd and 7th lord Mars.

If the 7th lord and/or the Sun is thrown in with planets causing foreign travel, a native may go abroad as a diplomat or delegate.
If Venus and the 7th lord are associated with long- distance yoga causing planets, the native may go abroad following marriage.
The Lagna is a movable sign occupied by its own lord and aspected by a powerful 7th lord Mars.
Rahu must give the results of Saturn according to the dictum 'Sanivad Rahu' and Saturn is not only the 7th lord but also in the 12th house.
If the lord of the 10th house occupies the 7th with the 7th lord, the native works abroad where he gets distinction and recognition.
If the Moon joins the 7th lord, his work will be connected with conveyances.
The aspect of 7th lord Saturn on 5th lord Jupiter is another important yoga fortifying the chart in general.

lord, 7th lord and the 10th lord shows loss of money through their respective significations, namely, enemies, litigation, women, children, co-boms, married partner and father.

Involvement in debts may be anticipated under the following combinations : Lagna lord joins the 2nd or the 7th lord is either eclipsed, debilitated or in an inimical sign in any of the dusthanas (the 6th, the 8th and 12th houses) while the 9th lord does not receive any benefic aspects ; the 2nd lord is eclipsed and conjoins a malefic in the 2nd or the 8th house ; the 2nd lord is both combust and debilitated and occupies a malefic shashtyamsa ; the Ascendant lord is afflicted both by a malefic planet and the lord of either the 6th, 8th or 12th.
The native's wife may have to face some danger or the other if the lord of the twelfth occupies the seventh with the 7th lord.
The affliction to Venus and the 7th lord Mercury afflicted in the 12th house are also responsible for it.

The presence of Venus in the 8th house, both as Kalatra- karaka and 7th lord, is not desirable since it gives a sickly husband.

Timing Marriage: The following planets would be capable of giving marriage in their periods (Dasas or Bhuktis):- (1) The lords of the Rasi and Navamsa occupied by the 7th lord namely.

In the late 40's and early 50's, this could not be said to be an early marriage nor even a very late one The Dasa lord Jupiter is the ruler of the Navamsa occupied by the 7th lord while the Bhukti lord Saturn is lord of both the 9th and 10th houses and aspects the 7th house.
Jupiter in transit was moving over this sign as well as 7th lord Mars at the time of marriage.
The association of the 7th lord Mars with the Moon gave a wife, many years younger—almost ten —than the native.

Our jyotish guru says, 'Venus, the lord of the first house for a Taurus lagna, is a very passive graha, a conciliator, while Mars, the seventh lord, is very assertive and bossy.
Because lagna lord Sun is the brightest planet, and seventh lord Saturn is the dimmest one, Leos tend to rule, or want to rule, their marriages and partnerships.

This makes sense only from the Cancer lagna, in which the seventh lord participates in a desirable Parivartana Yoga.
O n I March or thereabouts, transit Saturn had aspected the exact degree of her seventh house, after which it moved into Taurus, where it aspected the natal Saturn, the seventh lord, in Cancer.

rules.translation: Mercury (Kanya) Mars (3rd and 8th lord) is neutral.
(b) Mercury whose sub-period the boy was running when his paralysis became acute Is the eighth lord from the navamsha lagna while he ts the lagna lord of the birth horoscope.

As it is, during the period of Saturn, the seventh and the eighth lord, in itself bac, the sub-period of Rahu came round about 1979 and the boy died of kiciney failure in a hospital (Rahu in the twelfth house with Mars, representing operation surgically).
The sub-sub-period lord is Mercury, the eighth lord in the eighth house, representing a set-back, But being with a vargottama Sun, it did not cause any serious handicap.
And Venus as the eighth lord also could mean something sudden, sensational.
Though the Sun is the 8th lord, he becomes a neutral.
The neutrals in a horoscope are:—(1) The Moon—when he is lord of Lagna, (2) the Sun or the Moon as the 8th lord, (3) the Sun or the Moon as the lords of the 2nd and 12th.
If the lord of Lagna joins the 8th lord in the 8th, the native suffers misery and poverty.
When the 8th lord is afflicted or when the 5th lord is in the 6th, 8th or 12th (in Navamsa) from the 8th lord, the evil results will be considerably minimised.
If the 5th or 8th lord is in the 7th, death of wife or husband occurs.
If in addition to this the lord of the Navamsa occupied by the 8th lord is also a malefic the affliction becomes more intensified.
Venus is aspected by 8th lord Jupiter.
The Seventh House : Pisces, the seventh house, is occupied by 3rd and 8th lord Mars in Chart No.
Considered from the Moon : The 7th house Gemini is a dual sign and aspected by the 8th lord Moon and the 2nd and 3rd
The 7th house and the 8th lord the Moon in Navamsa are both heavily afflicted by the nodes.
The 8th lord from the Moon, namely, Mars, is afflicted by Saturn's aspect.
Afflictions to the 8th house and the 8th lord by Rahu, Ketu, Mars and Saturn in Rasi and Navamsa usually result in marriages that are socially not accepted or welcomed.
If the 8th lord is weak or placed in the 6th, 8th or 12th from Navamsa Lagna, the intensity of misfortune is reduced.
If the 8th lord is severely afflicted the native will suffer bodily complaints such as disease and disfiguration.
If the 8th lord is in the 6th, 8th or 12th from Navamsa Lagna, the intensity of the results will be reduced in degree.
If the 8th lord is in the 6th, 12th or 8th from Navamsa Lagna, the evil results are greatly mitigated.
If the 8th lord is in the 6th, 8th or 12th from Navamsa Lagna, the evil results will be greatly reduced.
If the 8th lord is placed in the 6th, 8th or 12th from Navamsa Lagna, the intensity of the evil is greatly reduced.
The 8th lord in the 10th may also confer unexpected gains due to the death of the superiors or elders.
In the Twelfth House .—The position of the 8th lord in the 12th house with the 12th lord gives rise to a Rajayoga.
If the 8th lord is in the 12th house and the 12th lord is favourably placed in a trine or quadrant, the native will gain in religious learning and piety.

If the 8th lord and maiefic occupy kendras, Panaparas or Apoklimas, the span of life is respectively short, medium or long Just because a chart contains the planetary positions given above, a conclusion on the longevity cannot be made at once.
If the Lagna is aspected by a malefic planet, the 8th lord is weak and the 8th house is aspected or occupied by Saturn, it results in a disease that will prevent the intake of food.
If Mars and the Sun exchange signs and are in kendras to the 8th lord, the native may be sentenced to death by the government.
If the Lagna lord is strong, the 8th lord can kill in his Dasa.
Saturn passes through the houses occupied by the 8th lord or the 12th lord from Lagna, death occurs.
Saturn's transit of the sign as far removed from Mandi as Mandi is from the 8th lord is also a fateful transit.
Jupiter also indicates death when he arrives at a sign that is triangular to the one occupisd by the 8th lord.
When the Moon crosses the Rasi or Navamsa occupied by the 8th lord or the Sun or their trines, death is likely.
The 7th and 8th lord from the Moon is Saturn.
Longevity must come within Alpayu due to the malefic nature of the asterisms ocoupied by Lagna lord, 8th lord and 3rd lord and the severe affliction to the Moon.
The Eighth Lord: Venus is debillitated in the 12th house with 12th lord Mercury.
The 8th lord is the Moon himself afflicted by Mars and Rahu.
Saturn is a first-rate maraka being the 7th and 8th lord.
The Eighth House : The 8th house is Aries aspected adversely by the 8th lord Mars and Saturn, the 5th and 6th lord in Chart No.
Also, there is a yoga 'if the 8th lord is in a kendra and the 8th house is not occupied by any planet, the native lives for 40 years'.
The Eighth Lord: Mars is afflicted by Rahu and Saturn.
Mars, Saturn and Rahu while the 8th lord being Saturn is also heavily afflicted.
Instead, there is malefic aspect on Lagna from Mars, Otherwise too, Lagna lord in a quadrant and 8th lord is afflicted and weak so that medium life can be expected.
In Navamsa, he is the 8th lord both from Lagna and Moon and is with the 2nd lord Saturn.
Conclusion : Both Lagna and 8th lords are fairly strong but the 8th lord Sun is stronger than Lagna lord both by placement and association.
Rahu in a sign ruled by 8th lord Sun shouid additionally give saturnine results and becomes a strong maraka.
Conclusion : The Lagna and 8th lord are together and afflicted by Saturn.
The Eighth Lord : The Moon is 8th lord in the 10th with 2nd and 3rd lord Saturn-
Considered from the Moon : The 8th house is occupied by 8th lord Mars and aspected by 7th lord Jupiter.
The Eighth Lord : Venus is well placed as 8th lord in the 11th house.
The Moon-sign lord Mercury and 8th lord Mars conjoin in the 6th house aspected by 7th lord Jupiter.
Conclusion : The Ascendant, the 8th lord, and the Moon are severely afflicted by malefics.

Venus is the 8th lord in the 7th from the Moon in Navamsa, Jupiter is the 3rd lord from Lagna, 2nd lord from the Moon in Rasi, the 7th lord from Navamsa Lagna and in the 2nd from Navamsa Moon, while Saturn is the natural death-dealer.
The Eighth House : Libra is the eighth house aspected by 8th lord Venus, 6th lord Sun and 7th lord Mercury.
Conclusion : Superficially, the chart does not, by the disposition of 8th lord, 8th house and Saturn indicate Purnayu.
The 8th house is aspected by a strong well-placed karaka who also aspects the 8th lord Jupiter.
The eighth lord Mars is with a malefic Ketu in the 7th which is the 12th from the 8th house aspected by 9th and 12th lord Jupiter.

Conclusion : The Lagna lord Venus in a dusthana, in the 8th house, the 8th lord Jupiter in a quadrant, the 8th lord from the Moon afflicted and weak in the 12th from the 7th house should have given Alpayu but actually the chart is of a Purnayu native.
The eighth lord is the Moon himself being placed with 2nd and 3rd lord Saturn.
63 Taurus is the 8th house aspected by Lagna and 8th lord Venus and 11 th lord Sun.
The Eighth House: Sagittarius, a fiery sign, is the 8th house and is aspected by 8th lord Jupiter and 2nd and 5th lord Mercury.
Conclusion : The Lagna and 8th lord being in the 12th house, weak by combustion and association with marakas does not indicate good longevity.
Ketu gives results similar to Mars and Mars is the 8th lord in the 12th in exact degree association with Vahanakaraka Venus.
Jupiter is a benefic but his presence as 8th lord in the 7th weakens him.
The 8th house is occupied by a malefic while the 8th lord is with malefics Mars and Sun in a Nigada (fetters) Drekkana.
The 8th lord is subject to a papakartari yoga.
The 8th lord is again Jupiter not afflicted by aspect or association in Rasi but aspected by Saturn in Navamsa.
The Eighth Lord : Saturn is the 8th lord in the 3rd house with 5th and 10th lord Mars and 3rd and 12th lord Mercury.
72, the 8th is occupied by 8th lord Saturn and aspected adversely by Mars, the 6th and 11th lord, and an afflicted 7th lord Jupiter.
Saturn is the 8th lord from Lagna in the 8th and in Navamsa, powerfully aspects the 7th house in association with Rahu.
Considered from the Moon : The eighth house is aspected by tha Sun and the 8th lord Jupiter, by Mars and Saturn.
Considered from the Moon : The 8th house is Pisces free of aspects or associations but the 8th lord Jupiter is with Venus and the Sun and subject to a papakartari yoga caused by Mars and Ketu.
The 8th house and 8th lord from Lagna and Moon are heavily afflicted by malefics.
The 8th lord Moon, though with Jupiter, is with Ketu also.

Conclusion : The native, the leader of a national political party, was killed and the body thrown on the rails, according to reports Mars, Saturn and Ketu influences on the 8th house and 8th lord indicate a violent end.
The closeness of the 8th lord Jupiter to Rahu is to be especially noted.
the 7th and 8th lord Saturn also being in an Ayudha Drekkana.
He is aspected by 8th lord Jupiter.
The 8th lord Venus is with Mars.
Considered from the Moon: The 8th house is occupied by a heavily afflicted 7th and 8th lord Saturn, Mars and Rahu.
The 8th lord is also Saturn and is with malefics Mars and Rahu.
If the lord of the ninth house occupy the eighth house with the eighth lord and is aspected by benefic planets, the native's father will die leaving the native a large inheritance.
If the 6th or 8th lord combines with the 9th lord in the 12th house, the native will lose his ancestral lands and money.
The presence of karaka Sun in the 9th house with 8th lord Jupiter is not conducive to longevity of father, The following planets can give the results of the 9th house with reference to father.
Note in both charts the Dasas of planets in the 8th house or of the 8th lord have not operated so far.
Paradesha Saham = 180° 18'or Libra 0° 18' occupied by Lagna lord Jupiter, Saham lord Venus, 8th lord Moon and the 12th lord Mars.
If Saturn is associated with the 8th lord in a malefic Navamsa, the native suffers under a tyrannical superior officer.
If a beneficially disposed 8th lord joins the combination, the native may become a ruler or prime-minister following the death of his predecessor.
If the lord of the 10th house is in the 8th with the 8th lord, the native may lose his job in humiliating circumstances in the Dasa of the 10th lord.
It is aspected by Lagna lord Jupiter and the 8th lord Moon.
192 the 10th house Virgo is aspected by the 8th lord vargottama
If the lord of the eleventh joins the 8th lord in the 8th house, one suffers from pecuniary losses and incurs mounting
Jupiter in the 11th is welcome but 8th lord
Considered from the Moon : The eleventh house is equally strong being Scorpio tenanted by the 8th lord Sun and the 9th lord Mercury.
Karaka Jupiter has exchanged signs with 8th lord the Moon.
If the Lagna lord is in the 8th house while the 8th lord joins the 2nd or the 7th lord in Lagna, the native will never earn enough for even bare subsistence.
Venus is also the 8th lord and is subject to a papa-kartari yoga between Saturn and the Sun.
The presence of the 8th lord and the 12th lord in a kendra has resulted in a Bandhana Yoga.
The Moon is closely placed to Rahu and is with 8th lord Mercury.
The 8th lord Jupiter in a dusthana and the 8th lord Sun (with reference to the Moon) being strong in a kendra are not very good for longevity.
Since both benefics and malefics are in a kendra (quadrant) and kona (trine) and 8th lord is in a malefic Bhava, the span of life can be said to be medium or madhyayu.
Dasa lords, Jupiter is the 8th lord from Lagna and the 3rd and- 12th lord from the Moon combining with 8th lord Sun.
The 8th house is free of aspects, malefic or benefic, while the 8th lord joins the Sun (4th lord) in the 6th house (roga- sthana).
Death was sudden and natural since there are no malefic aspects on the 8th house or 8th lord.
Saturn as the eighth lord when retrograde thus affects other planets and
houses by its aspect and occupation in a much more malefic way than does Saturn as the eighth lord when it is merely direct.

It is because both Saturn (as a natural malefic and as the eighth lord) and Ketu (as a natural malefic and as a significator for accidents) already individu- ally indicated the possibility of accident that the fall came to pass during their conjoint period.

The same Saturn who caused her star to blaze so brightly in Hollywood also caused her great misery as it transited her Moon because Saturn, the enemy of her lagna lord Moon, was for her the eighth lord, powerful by exaltation and retrogression.
For Marilyn Monroe, Mars occupied the eighth house; and for Hitler, Mars conjoined the eighth lord.

Only a Cancer ascendant for Indira Gandhi would create the following combinations for unnatural death: (a) the eighth lord, who happens to be the malefic Saturn, tenants the ascendant in an enemy's rashi unrelieved by the influence of any strong benefic; and (b) the same malefic lord of the eighth house aspects the lord of the ascendant, who is its enemy.
By taking the fifth house of the Cancer ascendant as the lagna, we find that the new eighth lord is combust in the (now) first house, where it is aspected by the violent Mars.
Although the lagna and its lord are very strong in this chart, all of the lagnas are simultaneously afflicted by the presence of Mercury, the eighth lord.
Rahu and Saturn are the very two natural malefics who afflict his first house of longevity, while Saturn as the eighth lord afflicts Rahu, the dasha lord.

rules.chapter: The Second Lesson Learn Hindu Astrology Easily
rules.translation: Saturn (Sth and 6th lord) is neutral.

If, however, in the Navamsa, the 6th lord is debilitated and lord of Lagna is exalted, favourable results may be anticipated.
When, however, the lord of Lagna is in the 6th, 8th or 12th in the Navamsa from the 6th lord, then favourable results will be minimised and tbe unfavourable results will not predominate.

When the 6th lord is in Lagna in conjunction with the lord of Lagna, the native will suffer from diseases or deformity to an organ, troubles from his superiors and machinations of enemies.
If the 6th lord occupies the 6th, 8th or 12th from Lagnadhipati (in Navamsa) there will be a tempering of the evil results suggested above.

He will have sharp attacks or misfortune, ill-health and financial losses continuously one after the other during the Dasa of the 6th lord if the 8th lord also joins the 6th lord in Lagna or the 6th and 8th lords are on either side of the Navamsa Lagna or Lagnadhipati in Navamsa.
When the 6th lord is in the 2nd with the 2nd lord, family life will be disrupted.

If the 6th lord posited in the 5th occupies the 4th, 5th, 7th, 9th or 11th degree and lord of Lagna is weak and afflicted, then the person will incur the displeasure of the rulers and suffer imprisonment in the Dasa of the 6th lord and the Bhukti of Lagnadhipati or vice versa.

It also happens, though, that Cancer natives are attracted to, or tend to attract, opponents, since lagna lord Moon and sixth lord Jupiter are friendly to one another.

The Sun as sixth lord effects an interest in medicine, especially if there is hospital involvement, because Pisces is the twelfth house (segregation, hospitals) of the natural zodiac, and because the iso- lated Saturn, the significator of the twelfth house, is lord of the twelfth house of a Pisces ascendant.

rules.chapter: OTHER G R A H A YOGAS
rules.translation: Here is one case: When the lord of the first house occupies the sixth house and the sixth lord sits in the lagna, and the lord of the sixth is conjoined with or aspected by the lord of a maraka house, the result will be penury (Brihat Parashara Hora 42: 3).

D A S H A S A N D B H U K T I S Because Mars, who dwells in an enemy's rashi in the eighth house, conjoins Jupiter, the sixth lord, Monroe's Mars Maha Dasha, which she experienced over the first five years of her life, was awful.
Jupiter (Dhanu) Saturn (2nd and 3rd lord) is neutral.

Lord of Lagna in the 3rd with the 3rd lord, fortified: There will be birth of brothers or prosperity to them, mental peace, and connection with pleasure-loving persons of both sexes.
When the 3rd lord is in the 6th, well disposed, younger brother joins the Army.
When the 3rd lord is in the 8th, he will suffer from a serious and dangerous disease and lose his younger brother.
When the 3rd lord is in the 9th, favourably disposed, the native's brother will inherit ancestral property.
When the 3rd lord is in the 10th, all the brother, will shine well and they will be helpful to him in all ways Eleventh House.—Not a very good combination..
When the 3rd lord is in the 12th, the youngest brother will be a tyrant.
A friendly 3rd lord occupying a Trikona from Lagna or Lagnadhipathi generally assures a family of brothers.
In general, the following results may be anticipated during the Dasa (or the Bhukti) of the third lord subject to the modification due to the other lordship, association, aspect, etc.
When the third lord is in the third, there will be birth of younger brothers (and sisters) ; prosperity will attend the existing brothers; the next eldest will have his marriage celebrated.

If the third lord is in the 6th, 8th or 12th from the 4th lord in the Navamsa, then either in the sub-period of the 3rd lord or in that of the 4tb lord (within the Dasa of the 3rd lord) brothers will die, the person will be deprived of his conveyance, and he will be extremely unhappy.
He will be entirely disappointed in his hopes if the 3rd lord holds an amsa which happens to be the 6th, 8th or 12th from the Navamsa of the 5th lord.
The native's brother will become a bitter enemy during the Dasa (or Bhukti) of the 3rd lord if he joins the 6th with the 6th lord.
The native's brother will go to far-off lands, if the 3rd lord is in the 7th with the 7th lord.
Brother's journey, as indicated above, will not come off if the 3rd lord is in the 6th, 8th or 12th from the 7th lord in the Navamsa ; nor does any kind of misfortune befall the brother.
When the 3rd lord is in the 8th with the 8th lord, the native will suffer from ear diseases, his enemies will win and the native becomes miserable and unhappy.
If, however, the 3rd lord is in the 8th with the 8th lord, and also has the contact of the 6th lord (either by aspect or association), the native will have financial gains.
The same results can also be anticipated if the 3rd lord is in the 6th, 8th or 12th from the 8th lord in the Navamsa.
The native's brother becomes fortunate and prosperous (in the Dasa of the 3rd lord) if the 3rd lord joins the 9th house with the 9th lord.
When the third lord is in Lagna with the lord of Lagna, there will be increase of prosperity.
When the 3rd lord is in the 2nd with the 2nd lord, the native's brother will die.
Conclusion.—Thus the third house is good, Mars ordinary and the third lord rather weak.
Therefore, whilst the th ir d house is not good, the third lord and Mars are well disposed with the result the native is blessed with a number of brothers and sisters.
The third lord Venus is more powerful than the planets aspecting the third.
Of the three elements, the third lord is more powerful than the third house or Mars.

The Third Lord.—The third lord happens to be Mars, the karaka.
Lord of Brothers.—Mars being the karaka is subject to the same influences as the third lord.
One will die in battle if the lord of the 6th or 8th or Mars joins the 3rd lord with Saturn and Rahu in cruel Navamsa.
During the sub-period of the 3rd lord, death or danger may befall a brother or sister.
Mars, who is combust, aspects the Lagna adversely The 3rd house and 3rd lord are both afflicted by Rahu.

He is the 3rd lord from the Moon in Rasi and the 7th lord in Navamsa and a first-rate killer.

Saturn represents dearth, is old (not young), and is the mutual enemy of lagna lord Mars; these factors may cause Saturn, the third lord, to limit the number of younger siblings, or to
Saturn's debilitation occurs in the third house of an Aquarius lagna, which promotes timidity and detracts from siblings, particularly since Mars, the third lord and significator, is Saturn's enemy.
In fact debilitated Saturn and Mars give humility.
The Moon — The Moon in Tula aspected by a retrogracie Saturn, debilitated in Aries and also by Mars from the sixth house!
What about debilitated Saturn?

Well, for god's sake, pay some attention also to the virtuous side of debilitated Saturn. “Destroyer of enemies, shine on the face, good position in life with prosperity. sticks to such norms of behaviour as one sets for oneself, enjoys sexual life”.
Saturn exalted and the Sun debilitated aspect Lagna.
Saturn or Mars, debilitated in the 11th from Arudha Lagna, give good earnings.
In Amsa the indications are no better as the third is occupied by debilitated Saturn.
From Chandra Lagna again, the fourth is occupied by debilitated Saturn and the lord happens to be in the twelfth from fourth.
It is aspected by debilitated Saturn, lord of the 7th.
Saturn debilitated there and the papakartari to the 11th house does not augur well for elder co-borns.
Saturn is debilitated but gets cancellation of debility due to his exaltation and debilitation lords, Mars and Venus, being in mutual kendras.
Capri- corn's ruler, Saturn, is debilitated in the first house and, since Mars represents bursts of energy and Saturn represents stamina, Arians often do not strategize well for the longer term.

Books can provide only information; the reader must learn how to judge the many factors which do not admit of easy quantification, such as the fact that Saturn is such an important graha that, even when debilitated, it does not become completely without energy.

Saturn being debilitated in Aries as the natural significator of subordinates, the person may also experience great difficulty with underlings; being the natural indicator of nerves, a debilitated Saturn may create symptoms like nervousness and irritability, and so on.
But if at the time of birth Saturn was combust or debilitated, the activation of the seventh house in such a horoscope by transiting Saturn may promote marital disharmony, and may even cause divorce.

rules.chapter: The Second Lesson Learn Hindu Astrology Easily
rules.translation: A person has debilitated Mars in his horoscope.
Mark the presence of Mars, lord of the 6th in Lagna, almost in exact conjunction with the ascendant point, aspected further by debilitated Saturn.
Of all the planets connected with the 4th house, Mars is the greatest malefic who is also debilitated.
In Navamsa, the 8th is afflicted by debilitated Mars and afflicted Jupiter.
It is also aspected by debilitated Mars.
It is aspected by debilitated Mars.
The Moon, ruler of the mind, is in a dusthana aspected by malefic Mars and debilitated Venus.

The fact that Mars, the lord of the lagna, is debilitated in Cancer, which here is the fourth house of home, militates toward a life lived away from one's homeland, and a disinclination to settle down.

Scorpios often dispute with their parents, since Saturn, Mars's mutual enemy, rules the fourth house of parents (the mother in particular), and because Mars is debilitated in the ninth house of father.

Being a lagna of Mars, the individualist planet, Scorpios may have exceedingly heterodox views on religion and philosophy, and may have difficult relationships with their mentors, because the lagna lord is debilitated in the ninth house of spirituality.

While many companies are of course able to hold peaceful Tuesday board meetings, this woman's experience of Tuesdays was particularly painful because her Mars was debilitated in Cancer in her eighth house and was subject to a number of afflictions.

Pushya's Tamasic side will be displayed more readily when it is occupied by Mars than by Jupiter, both because Mars is inherently Tamasic and Jupiter is inherently Sattvic, and because Pushya appears in the constellation of Cancer, in which Mars is debilitated and Jupiter is exalted.

rules.chapter: T H E D H A R M A K A R M A A D H I P A T I YOGAS
rules.translation: This is particularly true for Cancer lagna, because Mars, the Raja Yoga Karaka, is debilitated in the first house.

rules.chapter: The Second Lesson Learn Hindu Astrology Easily
rules.translation: In his horoscope a person has three exalted planets, Saturn, jupiter and the Sun.

rules.chapter: The Second Lesson Learn Hindu Astrology Easily
rules.translation: In the horoscope of Ramakrishna Paramhamsa, Saturn is exalted, Venus Is exalted, Mars is exalted .
Saturn Is exalted, like Mercury.

He will generally be without any money or have a defective limb When Saturn is exalted or posited in his own place, the person born will be a chief of his clan, well-educated, possess wisdom ; he will be a king or a rich personage.
Exalted Saturn aspects the Moon.
Venus, the ruler of the sign where Saturn gets exalted, is in a quadrant so that he gets neechabhanga (cancellation of debility).
It is hemmed in between malefics, exalted Saturn and Mars and Rahu.
Saturn, the Yogakaraka, occupies another kendra and both luminaries are exalted, lifting the chart well above average.
The planet of law and justice Saturn is very strong being both exalted and vargottama and aspects the Lagna giving the personality a balanced judicious outlook.
Three planets—all major planets— Saturn, Jupiter and Mars are exalted in mutual kendras.
Malefic Saturn aspects him but this is countered by the aspect of an exalted sign dispositor and benefic, Jupiter.
Elder co-borns The 11th house is Pisces, a fruitful sign and is aspected by Yogakaraka Saturn and exalted benefic Mercury.

An exalted Saturn may indicate not merely ruins or an abandoned house but rather exalted ruins (like Stonehenge) or a house that is listed on the register of historic locations, while a debilitated Saturn may indicate drafty houses, or

Saturn, a mutual friend of lagna lord Venus, gives Librans a pronounced interest in politics because he rules both the fourth house (the masses) and the fifth house (the formation of governing bodies); because he indicates government; and because he is exalted in the ascendant.
Aquarians thus enjoy gathering knowledge, because Venus is lord of two education houses (four and nine) and Saturn is exalted in the ninth house.

rules.chapter: T H E D H A R M A K A R M A A D H I P A T I YOGAS
rules.translation: For Saturn as the Raja Yoga Karaka to be exalted in Libra is very desirable, for it also creates a Shasha Yoga in the first house, and Saturn is a friend of Venus, the lord of the lagna.
By aspecting the fourth house from this position, the exalted Saturn restimulated its natal position.
This is because Saturn, the yoga's dispositor Oiva), is exalted and retrograde, occu- pies a kendra, and is aspected by two benefics and no malefics.

Saturn, the lord of the Moon Lagna, strengthens that lagna by being in a kendra, exalted, retrograde, and aspected by two natural benefics, one of whom, Venus, is the Raja Yoga Karaka for the Moon Lagna.
The Shasha Yoga created by the exalted Saturn in the ninth bhava recurs, as d o all the other yogas in this chart, from all three lagnas, since all three lagnas are in Aquarius.

Some suggest that an exalted but retrograde planet gives the net effect of a debilitated planet, but this chart provides ample evidence to the contrary, for the exalted but retrograde Saturn gave im- mensely powerful results.

In this horoscope Saturn (renunciate tendencies) is the lord of the ascendant (general characteristics, including all-round success in life and renown) and of the twelfth bhava (renunciation, moksha), and it sits exalted in the ninth bhava (dharma, religion, higher knowledge).

All three lagnas become exceptionally strong in Ramakrishna's horoscope because Saturn, the lord of all three, is exalted in the auspicious ninth bhava, where it is not hampered by the association or aspect of any malefic.

Two of these are that the ninth bhava contains the exalted lagna lord Saturn, whose dispositor is also exalted; and that the twelfth house contains an exalted planet whose dispositor is also exalted in, of all places, the ninth house.

Some texts state that Capricornians are religious hypocrites because Jupiter, the significator of spirituality, rules two dussthanas (the third and twelfth houses) and is debilitated in the first house of a Capricorn ascendant.
The native may feel or may actually be let down by friends, older siblings, clubs or societies, since Jupiter is debilitated in the eleventh house.

A Jupiter which is debilitated, rules bad houses, occupies a detrimen- tal house, is aspected by Mars and Saturn, and is associated with Rahu will often create results quite the opposite of wonderful.

rules.chapter: The Second Lesson Learn Hindu Astrology Easily
rules.translation: In his horoscope, a person has exalted Sun, exalted Venus but debilitated Mercury.

rules.chapter: The Second Lesson Learn Hindu Astrology Easily
rules.translation: In his horoscope, a person has the Sun debilitated, jupiter debilitated, the Moon debilitated but Mercury exalted.
The Sun may be exalted, debilitated, may occupy a friendly sign, may be in his own sign and may form important yogas.
The Sun is debilitated in the 11th but the relieving features are, cancellation of debility and Jupiter aspecting the Sun.

The Lagna is occupied by a malefic, debilitated Sun.
The Sun is not only debilitated and associating with his bitter enemy Saturn but also in a nodal constellation.

An Indian proverb mandates 'One jungle, one lion', and indeed the fact that the Sun is debilitated in the third house suggests that Leo natives neglect t o make room for their younger siblings, who must find their own jungles in which to roar.
But they are often led astray by bad company, since the Sun is debilitated in the first house, and over concern with their social lives may cause them to permit their friends to waste their time.

If the 9th lord combines with the Lagna lord in the first house and associates with or is aspected by a benefic planet, the native is fortunate with riches and happiness.
In the Second House : When the ninth lord is placed in the 2nd house beneficially, the native's father is a rich and influential man.
Malefics influencing the ninth lord in the 2nd house ruin or destroy paternal property.

In the Fourth House : The ninth lord in the 4th house gives vast landed properties and beautiful bungalows.
If the ninth lord is afflicted in the 4th house, the native may not have any domestic unhappiness.
In the Filth House : The ninth lord in the fifth house gives a prosperous and famous father.
In the Sixth House : The ninth lord in the sixth house gives a sickly father afflicted with chronic diseases.
If malefics afflict the ninth lord in the sixth house, the native's attempts to make his fortune may be frustrated through litigation involving his father or debts contracted by him.
If asubhayogas spoil the ninth lord, the father may meet with his death abroad.

If malefics afflict the eighth house in such a case, he may suffer severe poverty and heavy responsibility due to father's death If benefics influence the ninth lord, the native may inherit substantial paternal property.
If afflicted by malefics or if the 9th lord occupies the 6th, 8th or 12th from Navamsa Lagna, the native's father will die early.
If the 9th house be a movable sign or the 9th lord be in a movable sign either in conjunction with or aspected by Saturn and the 12th lord is strong, the native will be adopted by another.
If the 9th lord is aspected by a malefic, inimical or debilitated planet and is in the 6th house, the person suffers in every respect.
If the 9th lord be in a malefic shashtyamsa or occupy a debilitated sign or Navamsa or be weak or if malefics occupy the 9th house, the native is unfortunate in life.
Venus or Jupiter in the 9th or aspecting the 9th lord indicate a fortunate life.

These planets may influence the ninth house as either the lords of the main periods or as lords of the sub-periods. (1) The sub-periods of planets capable of influencing the 9th house in the major periods of those who are also capable of influencing the 9th house produce results relating to the 9th house par excellence. (2) The sub-periods of planets associated with the 9th house in the major periods of planets who are not associated with the ninth house produce results pertaining to the ninth house only to a limited extent. (3) The sub-periods of planets not associated with the 9th house in the main periods of planets who are associated with the 9th house produce results relating to the 9th house to a very small extent. (a) Lord of the 9th house- Mars, (b) planets aspecting the 9th house—Saturn, (c) planets in the 9th house —none, (d) planets aspecting the 9th lord-Jupiter, (e) planets in association with 9th lord—Mercury, (f) lord of the 9th house from the Moon— Venus, and (g) the Sun.
If benefics aspect the 9th lord, his Dasa brings in conveyances.
If the 9th lord is weak, debilitated or eclipsed or in malefic Navamsas, that is, the 6th, 8th or 12th from Navamsa Lagna, the results will be quite contrary.
If Rahu and the 9th lord combine in strength, the native may serve foreign powers.

If the 9th lord occupies the 6th, 8th or 12th Navamsa, then also the degree of beneficial results will be greatly modified.
If the 9th lord is exalted in this position, the native may become a President or ruler of a country in the Dasa of the 9th lord.

Mars with the 9th lord gives the native landed property abroad while he will earn through women if Venus is involved.

Fortune booms after marriage and the wife will be a noble and rich woman hailing from a respectable family, if the 9th lord be placed in the 6th, 8th or 12th from Navamsa Lagna, the results will be greatly modified.

If the 9th lord in the 10th house is well placed but the 9th lord occupies the 6th, 8th or 12th Navamsas, results will be good but their degree will be only middling.

If Jupiter or Mercury aspect the ninth lord in the eleventh house or if the eleventh lord be one of these planets gains will be through the newspaper, publication of books or educational institutions.

If the 9th lord occupies the 6th, 8th or 12th houses in Navamsa, the native earns moderate wealth and will be fairly well-off.
He will lose his father during the Dasa of the 9th lord or may live far away from him.

If the 12th house is represented by a biped or quadruped sign and the 9th lord is afflicted by malefics and is himself debilitated or eclipsed, the native will lose his cattle, pets, horses and also his servants and workers in the Dasa of the ninth lord.

The following factors must be considered in timing foreign journeys, namely, (a) lord of the 9th house-the Moon ; (b) planet or planets aspecting the 9th house—Saturn ; (c) planet in the 9th house—Jupiter ; (d) planets aspecting the 9th lord—Saturn and Jupiter; (e) planets in association with the 9th lord—Mercury, Rahu and Ketu ; and (f) the 9th lord from the Moon —Mars.

as 9th lord in a trine is good for father, his association with Mercury who is also the 2nd lord is not desirable.

rules.translation: Jupiter, which occupies Cancer here, similarly influences Scorpio by its fifth aspect and Pisces by its ninth aspect; and Saturn, who here tenants Gemini, influences Leo by its third aspect and Pisces by its tenth aspect - all counted inclusively from the constellation where the planet resides.
